title: Y'all are Amazing
excerpt: Even after living in Atlanta for 10 years, I don't actually say "y'all". Typing it is fun though, and so is seeing your fantastic layouts using the Sketchbook line from American Crafts . Here are just a couple of the…
body:
Even after living in Atlanta for 10 years, I don't actually say "y'all". Typing it is fun though, and so is seeing your fantastic layouts using the Sketchbook line from American Crafts. Here are just a couple of the projects I’ve spotted lately:

by Kate


by Heather Leopard

mini book tutorial by Piradee 

As many of you may already know, it's National Scrapbooking Day tomorrow (there is such a thing!). As JC would say, "Isn't that every day?" We have some fun stuff going on tomorrow at Two Peas In A Bucket. I will be on the boards chatting at 4pm PDT for an hour. Hope you'll come and join in on the fun.
